meaning: n.瀵嗗厠缃楀凹瑗夸簹(瑗垮お骞虫磱宀涚兢,鎰忎负"灏忓矝缇ゅ矝")
examples: Micronesia, the area north of Melanesia, consists primarily of small scattered islands.
Before the arrival of Europeans, the islands in the two largest cultural areas, Polynesia and Micronesia, together contained a population estimated at 700,000.
The term Micronesia may refer to the Federated States or to the region as a whole.
My test Evoque was Kosrae Green, a hue named for an island in Micronesia.
This includes the Federated States of Micronesia, the Marshall Islands, the Philippines, and even Hawaii.
